Hacker News Confidence

Less annoying hacker news. (What is this?)

This site scrapes Hacker News once every 30 minutes, then sorts according to this formula, with upvotes as positive signals and comments as negative ones. In my experience, the best articles to read on HN are the ones with a high upvote-to-discussion ratio. Mostly because controversial pieces tend to produce a disproportionate number of comments compared to upvotes.


  1. Clojure: The Documentary, official trailer [video] 60 upvotes, 2 comments
  2. William Blake, Remote by the Sea 65 upvotes, 4 comments
  3. OpenGridWorks: The Electricity Infrasctructure, Mapped 66 upvotes, 5 comments
  4. Researchers find 3,500-year-old loom that reveals textile revolution 88 upvotes, 8 comments
  5. Agents of Chaos 85 upvotes, 9 comments
  6. Cherri – programming language that compiles to an Apple Shortuct 277 upvotes, 54 comments
  7. Axios Compromised on NPM – Malicious Versions Drop Remote Access Trojan 99 upvotes, 18 comments
  8. Fedware: Government apps that spy harder than the apps they ban 476 upvotes, 150 comments
  9. How to turn anything into a router 622 upvotes, 215 comments
  10. Do your own writing 415 upvotes, 148 comments
  11. Unit: A self-replicating Forth mesh agent running in a browser tab 12 upvotes, 1 comments
  12. Show HN: I turned a sketch into a 3D-print pegboard for my kid with an AI agent 15 upvotes, 2 comments
  13. Build123d: A Python CAD programming library 129 upvotes, 49 comments
  14. Incident March 30th, 2026 – Accidental CDN Caching 32 upvotes, 8 comments
  15. Seeing Like a Spreadsheet 86 upvotes, 31 comments
  16. Turning a MacBook into a touchscreen with $1 of hardware (2018) 232 upvotes, 101 comments
  17. Universal Claude.md – cut Claude output tokens by 63% 158 upvotes, 66 comments
  18. A sea of sparks: Seeing radioactivity 57 upvotes, 19 comments
  19. Recover Apple Keychain 66 upvotes, 23 comments
  20. Roulette Computers: Hidden Devices That Predict Spins 79 upvotes, 29 comments
  21. Artemis II is not safe to fly 53 upvotes, 18 comments
  22. Principles and Gear 13 upvotes, 2 comments
  23. Learn Claude Code by doing, not reading 195 upvotes, 93 comments
  24. Show HN: Coasts – Containerized Hosts for Agents 68 upvotes, 28 comments
  25. CodingFont: A game to help you pick a coding font 348 upvotes, 187 comments
  26. Bird brains (2023) 303 upvotes, 192 comments
  27. I am definitely missing the pre-AI writing era 294 upvotes, 216 comments
  28. Why I'm betting on ATProto (and why you should, too) 96 upvotes, 80 comments
  29. Android Developer Verification 173 upvotes, 159 comments
  30. In math, rigor is vital, but are digitized proofs taking it too far? 109 upvotes, 99 comments

Last generated 12:00pm, 31 March 2026. Source here.
